title: ₹1 lakh accident insurance for all school/college students — Rajiv Vidya Bheema
target_beneficiaries: All students enrolled in government and aided institutions
summary: Rajiv Vidya Bheema provides ₹1 lakh accident insurance cover to students enrolled in government and government-aided schools and colleges. A GO was issued and insurer empanelled for the 2024-25 academic year. Coverage is active and claims are being processed, fulfilling this commitment.

sources.label: Rajiv Vidya Bheema scheme launch GO — @TelanganaCMO
Student accident insurance scheme operational — The Hindu
